suggested_invariant.title: Endpoint GET /_reference/demo-tenants has no role binding
suggested_invariant.statement: Endpoint GET /_reference/demo-tenants appears in the api-map but has no @UseGuards / @Roles declarations and no entry in rbac.bindings.endpointBindings. Per INV-INVENTORY-003, every endpoint MUST either declare a role binding OR carry an explicit auth.required=false claim before release.
suggested_invariant.rationale: Default-deny policy: an endpoint with no declared auth is a discovery gap. Either bind a role (write a guard) OR explicitly mark the endpoint public — ambiguity is not.
